Title: Aquarius
Description: Aquarius Network is the governance and liquidity layer for Stellar. Powered by the AQUA token, it enables the community to vote on market rewards, direct liquidity incentives, and guide ecosystem development. By aligning incentives for traders, liquidity providers, and projects, Aquarius strengthens Stellar's DeFi infrastructure and supports sustainable network growth.

Title: Kale
Description: KALE is an asset issued on the Stellar blockchain that can be acquired through a mining contract . The more KALE you have, the higher you are on the leaderboard and the more clout you have amongst your fellow KALE HODLers.
